response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep exposure to TypeScript, cloud platforms (AWS), and agentic workflows including MCP, aligning well with core requirements; however, his resume lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph, and his education is only a BS with no advanced degree, making him a borderline fit requiring further clarification.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK)
Direct exposure to Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflow tooling
Proven track record in building scalable data pipelines and developer tooling
concerns: No clear evidence of 8+ years dedicated to AI/ML production systems
Missing explicit experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
No advanced degree; limited documentation of LLM metrics or multi-agent frameworks
